activities.title: Morning Stroll at Little Sugar Creek Greenway
activities.description: Enjoy a refreshing morning walk or run along the scenic Little Sugar Creek Greenway. This urban oasis offers miles of paved trails, connecting parks, gardens, and public art, perfect for a peaceful start to your day.

activities.title: Explore Romare Bearden Park
activities.description: Spend your afternoon relaxing or people-watching at Romare Bearden Park, a vibrant urban park in Uptown. Admire the lighted waterfall wall, misting fountains, and unique art installations while enjoying stunning city views.

activities.title: Self-Guided Public Art Tour in Uptown
activities.description: Embark on a self-guided walking tour to discover Charlotte's impressive collection of public art in Uptown. Use resources like ArtWalks CLT to find murals, sculptures, and unique installations, including the iconic 'Firebird' sculpture.

activities.title: Evening Ambiance in NoDa
activities.description: Experience the eclectic charm of NoDa, Charlotte's historic arts district. Take an evening stroll to admire the colorful murals and street art, and soak in the vibrant, queer-friendly atmosphere of this walkable neighborhood.

activities.title: Night Out in Plaza Midwood
activities.description: Head to Plaza Midwood for a lively evening. This neighborhood is known for its diverse and inclusive vibe, offering plenty of no-cover bars and cafes where you can enjoy the atmosphere and socialize.

activities.title: Morning Hike at Reedy Creek Nature Preserve
activities.description: Connect with nature at Reedy Creek Nature Center and Preserve, offering over 10 miles of free hiking trails. Explore diverse ecosystems, spot local wildlife, and enjoy a refreshing outdoor workout.
activities.location: Reedy Creek Nature Center and Preserve, Northeast Charlotte

activities.title: UNC Charlotte Botanical Gardens Visit
activities.description: Wander through the beautiful and diverse collections at the UNC Charlotte Botanical Gardens. Admission is always free, allowing you to explore various plant collections, including native and exotic species, and enjoy the serene environment.
activities.location: UNC Charlotte Botanical Gardens, University City

activities.title: Afternoon at Camp North End
activities.description: Discover the evolving art and culture scene at Camp North End. Stroll through the grounds to see vibrant murals and public art, window shop at unique boutiques, and soak in the creative energy of this revitalized industrial space.

activities.title: Free Evening at Mint Museum Uptown & Bechtler Museum of Modern Art
activities.description: Take advantage of free admission on Wednesday evenings (5-9 PM) at the Mint Museum Uptown and the Bechtler Museum of Modern Art. Explore world-class art collections, from modern masterpieces to contemporary craft and design.
activities.location: Mint Museum Uptown & Bechtler Museum of Modern Art, Uptown

activities.title: Plaza Midwood Mural Walk
activities.description: Embark on a self-guided tour of the vibrant murals and street art throughout Plaza Midwood. This neighborhood is a canvas for local artists, offering colorful and thought-provoking pieces around every corner.

activities.title: Evening Walk along the Charlotte Rail Trail
activities.description: Enjoy a leisurely evening walk along the Charlotte Rail Trail in South End. This urban trail is lined with public art installations, unique shops (for window shopping), and offers a great way to experience the neighborhood's lively atmosphere.

activities.title: Nightlife in South End
activities.description: Discover the vibrant nightlife of South End. While many spots have cover charges, you can enjoy the lively atmosphere and people-watch at various no-cover breweries or outdoor patios that are typically bustling on a Wednesday evening.

activities.title: Morning Coffee at Central Coffee Co.
activities.description: Start your day with a delicious coffee and pastry at this beloved independent coffee shop in Plaza Midwood. Known for its cozy ambiance, exposed brick, and friendly staff, it's a perfect spot to relax or catch up on emails.

activities.title: Run or Walk Little Sugar Creek Greenway
activities.description: Enjoy a refreshing morning run or leisurely walk along a scenic section of the Little Sugar Creek Greenway. This urban oasis offers paved trails, connects several parks, and is a great way to experience Charlotte's natural beauty.
activities.location: Little Sugar Creek Greenway, Various points

activities.title: Afternoon Happy Hour at Common Market
activities.description: Grab an affordable drink and a snack during happy hour at Common Market. This local favorite offers a laid-back atmosphere, a great selection of craft beers, and a diverse crowd, perfect for an adventurous spirit.

activities.title: Cheap Eats at Optimist Hall
activities.description: Explore the diverse culinary offerings at Optimist Hall, a vibrant food hall with numerous vendors. You can find a variety of delicious and affordable meal options, from tacos to noodles, ensuring there's something for every craving.

activities.title: Live Music at Petra's
activities.description: Catch an evening of live indie folk music with Sneaky Miles, Emily June, and Group Therapy at Petra's, a popular queer-friendly spot known for its eclectic events and welcoming vibe. It's a great way to discover new local talent.

activities.title: Dive Bar Vibes & Live Music at Snug Harbor
activities.description: Immerse yourself in Charlotte's alternative music scene at Snug Harbor, a legendary dive bar in Plaza Midwood. Tonight features Kon, JUNE!, Jyou, and Sumthing Orange, promising a night of raw, unfiltered performances in an intimate setting.

activities.title: Morning Coffee at Smelly Cat Coffeehouse
activities.description: Grab your morning brew at Smelly Cat Coffeehouse & Roastery, a long-standing NoDa institution. Known for its cozy atmosphere, quality roasts, and friendly staff, it's a perfect start to your Wednesday.

activities.title: Explore Camp North End & Goodyear Arts
activities.description: Spend your afternoon exploring the vibrant Camp North End district, a hub of creativity and innovation. Wander through the unique shops and art installations, and check out Goodyear Arts, an artist-run space offering free programming and gallery exhibitions.

activities.title: Wine Wednesday at Legion Brewing
activities.description: Unwind with 'Wine Wednesday' at Legion Brewing. Enjoy specials on wine in a relaxed brewery setting, perfect for a mid-week catch-up with friends or a casual solo outing.

activities.title: Trivia Night at Sycamore Brewing
activities.description: Test your knowledge at Tommy's Trivia Night at Sycamore Brewing in South End. Gather your friends or join a team for a fun and competitive evening with great craft beer and the chance to win prizes.

activities.title: Gourmet Grilled Cheese from Papi Queso
activities.description: Indulge in a gourmet grilled cheese sandwich from the renowned Papi Queso Food Truck. Featured on Diners, Drive-ins and Dives, their creative and delicious sandwiches are a Charlotte favorite and offer a satisfying, affordable meal.
activities.location: Papi Queso Food Truck (check schedule for location)

activities.title: Karaoke with Klaytastic at Petra's
activities.description: Unleash your inner rockstar at Karaoke with Klaytastic, happening every Wednesday night at Petra's. This lively and inclusive bar in Plaza Midwood offers a no-cover night of singing and fun, making it a perfect queer-friendly nightlife option.

activities.title: Whitewater Kayaking at USNWC
activities.description: Spend your morning on the water with whitewater kayaking or stand-up paddleboarding at the US National Whitewater Center. It's a great way to get active outdoors and experience the thrill of the rapids. Day passes or individual activity fees are available.
activities.location: US National Whitewater Center, West Charlotte

activities.title: Charlotte Knights Baseball Game
activities.description: Catch an afternoon baseball game as the Charlotte Knights take on the Nashville Sound. Enjoy America's favorite pastime at Truist Field, offering a lively atmosphere and classic ballpark snacks. Tickets start around $19.

activities.title: Mad Miles Run Club at Camp North End
activities.description: Join the Mad Miles Run Club for a free weekly run starting at Ford Green in Camp North End. All paces are welcome for this social and active community event. It's a fantastic way to meet locals and explore the vibrant Camp North End district.

activities.title: Topsail Steamer Boil & Brews
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious Topsail Steamer Boil & Brews event at The Chamber by Wooden Robot. This is a ticketed event offering a unique dining experience with fresh seafood and craft beer. It's a great option for a social evening with good food and drinks.
activities.location: The Chamber by Wooden Robot, South End

activities.title: Live Music at Petra's
activities.description: Experience live music with Sneaky Miles, Emily June, and Group Therapy at Petra's, a funky and queer-friendly bar in Plaza Midwood. Known for its eclectic atmosphere and diverse performances, it's a perfect spot for a night out. Tickets are affordable.

activities.title: Karaoke at Starlight on 22nd
activities.description: Sing your heart out at Karaoke Night at Starlight on 22nd, a casual and welcoming neighborhood bar between Optimist Park and NoDa. This queer-friendly spot offers a wide selection of craft cocktails and beers, making for a fun and relaxed night.

activities.title: Explore Charlotte with Free CATS Transit
activities.description: Celebrate Earth Day by taking advantage of complimentary public transit on all CATS modes. Use this opportunity to explore different neighborhoods, visit local parks, or simply enjoy a ride around the city. It's a great way to experience Charlotte sustainably.

activities.title: Beginner Pickleball at Camp North End
activities.description: Join Beginner/Recreational Play at Tipsy Pickle within Camp North End for some easygoing, social pickleball games. It's a fun way to learn a new sport or enjoy a casual game in a relaxed setting. Equipment rentals are usually available.

activities.title: Charlotte Knights 'Bark in the Ballpark'
activities.description: Head to Truist Field for a Charlotte Knights baseball game against the Nashville Sound, featuring their 'Bark in the Ballpark' promotion where you can bring your dog. Enjoy themed entertainment and fan-friendly promotions. Tickets are affordable.

activities.title: HOPS & HEELS Drag Show
activities.description: Don't miss HOPS & HEELS, a free drag show benefiting RAIN, happening at Pilot Brewing. This queer-friendly event promises an evening of fabulous performances and entertainment. It's a great way to support a good cause while enjoying drag.

activities.title: Cork & Cap Vinyl Night
activities.description: Be the DJ at Cork & Cap Vinyl Night in Camp North End. Bring your own records to share and discover new favorites while enjoying a selection of beers and wines. This free event offers a relaxed and social atmosphere for music lovers.

activities.title: FALCO & BOOK PLAY JERRY GARCIA
activities.description: Catch FALCO & BOOK PLAY JERRY GARCIA live at the Neighborhood Theatre. This ticketed music show offers a vibrant night of tunes for fans of Jerry Garcia's music. The Neighborhood Theatre is a popular venue for diverse live acts.

activities.title: Midweek Mixtape at Camp North End
activities.description: Enjoy a free Midweek Mixtape event at the Boileryard in Camp North End, featuring a live local band every week. It's a fantastic opportunity to discover new music in a lively outdoor setting. Grab a drink from a Camp North End vendor and enjoy the show.

activities.title: Luxury Spa Retreat at The Ballantyne
activities.description: Indulge in a personalized, award-winning spa experience at The Spa at The Ballantyne, offering bespoke massage therapies, rejuvenating facials, and body treatments. This tranquil resort-style setting provides a serene escape, perfect for unwinding and recharging.
activities.location: The Spa at The Ballantyne, Ballantyne

activities.title: Private Art Gallery Experience
activities.description: Discover exclusive contemporary art with a private viewing at a high-end gallery in Uptown Charlotte. Experience curated collections and potentially meet local artists, offering a sophisticated cultural immersion. This intimate setting ensures a personalized and enriching artistic journey.

activities.title: Exclusive 'In The Streets & Eats' Mural Tour
activities.description: Embark on a private guided tour of Charlotte's vibrant street art scene, exploring iconic murals in Uptown and surrounding neighborhoods. Gain local insights into the artists and their stories, with ample opportunities for stunning, photo-worthy snapshots.

activities.title: Fine Dining at McNinch House Restaurant
activities.description: Savor an unforgettable multi-course dining experience at the historic McNinch House Restaurant, renowned for its exquisite cuisine and elegant ambiance. Housed in a beautifully preserved Victorian-era home, it offers a meticulously curated menu perfect for a special evening.

activities.title: Upscale Cocktails at Nuvole Rooftop TwentyTwo
activities.description: Enjoy handcrafted cocktails and South American-inspired tapas at Nuvole Rooftop TwentyTwo, Charlotte's highest rooftop lounge. Perched 22 stories high, it offers breathtaking panoramic views of the city skyline, creating a chic and vibrant atmosphere.

activities.title: VIP Night at Chasers Noda
activities.description: Experience high-energy nightlife at Chasers Noda, a freshly renovated LGBTQ+ landmark known for its vibrant dance floor, EDM music, and go-go dancers. Opt for VIP access to enjoy an elevated experience in this welcoming and lively queer-friendly venue.

activities.title: Upscale Brunch at La Belle Helene
activities.description: Indulge in a sophisticated French brasserie brunch at La Belle Helene, featuring classic French fare in a soaring, elegant dining room. Enjoy exquisite dishes and a refined atmosphere, making for a perfect leisurely morning.

activities.title: Luxury Personal Shopping at SouthPark Mall
activities.description: Embark on a high-end shopping spree at SouthPark Mall, home to exclusive brands like Louis Vuitton, Burberry, and Gucci. Enjoy a personalized experience, discovering the latest in designer fashion and luxury goods.

activities.title: Theater Performance: 'Stereophonic'
activities.description: Immerse yourself in the critically acclaimed play 'Stereophonic' at Blumenthal Arts. This production is part of Charlotte's 2026 Broadway season, offering a compelling theatrical experience.

activities.title: Fine Dining at The Fig Tree Restaurant
activities.description: Experience elevated fine dining at The Fig Tree, nestled in a charming historic home, offering a seasonal menu rooted in French and Italian culinary traditions. Enjoy indulgent dishes complemented by an extensive, curated wine list.

activities.title: Chic Cocktails & Tapas at Búho Bar
activities.description: Ascend to Búho Bar atop the Grand Bohemian Hotel for a chic rooftop experience with panoramic city views. Savor handcrafted cocktails and South American-inspired tapas, enhanced by live DJ sets in a sophisticated open-air lounge.

activities.title: Lively Night at Bar Argon
activities.description: Dance the night away at Bar Argon, Charlotte's only video dance bar and lounge, offering an energetic mix of cocktails, DJs, and themed parties in a vibrant LGBTQ+ space. Enjoy karaoke nights or drag performances in a clubby atmosphere.

activities.title: Goat Yoga: Mystical Creatures Edition
activities.description: Experience goat yoga with a twist! This session features miniature goats dressed in whimsical, mythical creature costumes, adding an extra layer of bizarre charm to your morning stretches. Expect playful interactions and plenty of photo opportunities at this unique farm setting.
activities.location: Cotton Bean Goat Farm, Mt. Pleasant (30 miles from Charlotte)

activities.title: Taxidermy Fundamentals: The Art of Preservation
activities.description: Delve into the peculiar world of taxidermy with a beginner-friendly workshop. Learn the basic techniques of preserving small specimens (ethically sourced, of course) and create your own unique piece of natural art. All materials and guidance provided for this hands-on, one-of-a-kind experience.

activities.title: Fringe Theatre: 'The Ballad of the Sentient Sock Puppet'
activities.description: Witness a truly unexpected theatrical performance from a local fringe troupe. This avant-garde puppet show explores themes of existentialism and laundry, promising a night of thought-provoking absurdity and campy charm. Expect unconventional storytelling and a memorable, bizarre narrative.

activities.title: Paranormal Pub Crawl: Spirits & Suds
activities.description: Join a spirited (and boozy) walking tour through Charlotte's most haunted pubs and historic sites. Your costumed guide will share chilling local ghost stories and bizarre historical anecdotes, with stops at several establishments for a 'spirit' or two. Must be 21+ to participate.
activities.location: Uptown Charlotte (starting point: The Dunhill Hotel)

activities.title: Midnight Movie Marathon: Cult Classics & Cereal
activities.description: Indulge in a late-night screening of three obscure cult classic films, complete with unlimited sugary cereal and vintage cartoons during intermissions. This campy cinematic experience is perfect for film buffs seeking something truly offbeat and nostalgic.

activities.title: Competitive Eating: The Carolina Chili Challenge
activities.description: Watch or participate in a fiery competitive eating contest featuring Charlotte's spiciest chili recipes. Competitors will battle it out for bragging rights and a cash prize, pushing their limits in this intense and bizarre culinary showdown. Spectators welcome to cheer (or cringe).

activities.title: Ax Throwing League: 'Battle of the Bladed Beasts'
activities.description: Test your aim and inner warrior at this open tryout for a themed ax throwing league. Learn proper technique from experts and compete in a friendly, yet fierce, environment. Perfect for those looking for an active and unusual afternoon challenge.

activities.title: Drag Racing: 'Wednesday Night Grudge Matches'
activities.description: Experience the raw power and speed of amateur drag racing at zMAX Dragway. 'Wednesday Night Grudge Matches' feature local enthusiasts battling it out on the strip, offering an adrenaline-pumping evening of roaring engines and unexpected outcomes.

activities.title: Red Velvet Burlesque: 'Neo-Noir & Neon Dreams'
activities.description: Immerse yourself in a captivating evening of neo-burlesque, blending classic tease with modern, artistic performances. This show features intricate choreography, stunning costumes, and a touch of the unexpected, set in an intimate cabaret atmosphere.

activities.title: Indie Wrestling: ASÉ Wrestling 'Cryptid Clash'
activities.description: Witness high-flying action and unique characters at ASÉ Wrestling's 'Cryptid Clash' event. This independent professional wrestling promotion brings a diverse roster and innovative storytelling to the ring, promising an unforgettable night of theatrical combat and fan interaction.

activities.title: Oddities & Curiosities Night Market
activities.description: Explore a curated market featuring vendors selling taxidermy, preserved specimens, unique artwork, vintage medical devices, and other bizarre collectibles. Discover one-of-a-kind treasures and mingle with fellow enthusiasts of the strange and unusual.
activities.location: The Gilded Cellar at Resident Culture South End, South End
